name: cactus-tv
description: Cactus TV for Cloudflare Pages, Pages Functions and D1.

scripts.check:js: node --check public/js/api.js && node --check public/js/storage.js && node --check public/js/player.js && node --check public/js/player-ui.js && node --check public/js/app.js && node --check public/js/admin.js
scripts.check: npm run build:functions && npm run check:js && npm run preflight
